description.value:
Aspect water

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Effect Your relic can absorb and release water, storing it in an endless reservoir. You either touch your relic to an adjacent body of water and absorb 1 gallon of it into the reservoir, or you release 1 gallon of a liquid from the reservoir. You can add another action to the activation to absorb water from a touched creature made entirely of water, like a water elemental. If you do, it takes @Damage[1d6] damage per relic level (@Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|basic] save).

Activate r (manipulate)

Trigger You are targeted by an acid or water effect

Effect Your relic attempts to counteract the effect, expending 1 gallon of stored liquid. At the GM's discretion, you can use this ability on effects made of other liquids, such as blood.
